config.script:
area = self.getSibling("drpArea").props.value
	line= self.getSibling("drpLine").props.value
	workStation = self.getSibling("drpStation").props.value
	rACode = self.getSibling("drpRACode").props.value
	status = self.getSibling("drpStatus").props.value
	fromDate = system.perspective.print(self.getSibling("FromDateTimeInput").props.value)
	toDate = system.perspective.print(self.getSibling("ToDateTimeInput").props.value)
	
	system.perspective.print(area)
	system.perspective.print(line)
	system.perspective.print(workStation)
	system.perspective.print(rACode)
	system.perspective.print(status)
	system.perspective.print(fromDate)
	system.perspective.print(toDate)
	
	
	path = 'Project_VECV/TentativeReports/getGenericReport'
	params = {'area':area,'line':line,'workStation':workStation,'rACode':rACode,'status':status,'fromDate':fromDate,'toDate':toDate}
	data = system.db.runNamedQuery(path,params)
	system.perspective.print(data)
	
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTable").getChild("Table").props.data = data

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	"""	Purpose:			 
			To export details 
					
			Created by: Piyush Sethiya
			Date: 02/08/2024		"""	
	try:

		data=self.getChild("ColumnContainer").getChild("cntTable").getChild("Table").props.data
		columns=["SerialNumber","WorkStationName","Description","Status"]
		data=system.dataset.filterColumns(data, columns)
		XLSFormat = system.dataset.dataSetToExcel(True,[data])
		system.perspective.download("ReportTable.xls",XLSFormat)				
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Generic Report Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Generic Report')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntBody/TabContainer/cntTable/btnExport')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block
